normalization: The pinned UTF-8 CSV was parsed by header with Python csv.DictReader. Counts use data rows only; issue types and video_model slugs use exact distinct strings; Unrated is an exact issue_severity match; a row lacks timestamps when either timestamp cell is empty; duplicates compare every parsed column.
rights_note: The dataset declares CC BY 4.0. This repository retains attribution, the pinned CSV URL and hash, the audit method, and aggregate QA only, not dataset rows or videos.

items.normalized_evidence: The pinned CSV hash is b7490d49978b2d373bd9320981fce16fcf2667d0df2399fdba9ee3b8c8122d91. An audit found 544 rows, 31 issue-type values, 157 Unrated severities, 95 rows without timestamps, 19 video slugs for 15 files, and one exact duplicate.

notes: The aggregate audit qualifies dataset reuse; it does not evaluate Seedance, establish model architecture, or validate prompt grammar.
